x_snc_airop_check_definition.ai_justification: Business service maps provide the service context Now Assist TSOM uses for impact analysis. Without maps, AI cannot determine affected services.
x_snc_airop_check_definition.check_script: (function(){var gr=new GlideRecord("cmdb_ci_service");gr.addQuery("active",true);gr.addQuery("has_map",true);gr.query();var mapped=gr.getRowCount();var gr2=new GlideRecord("cmdb_ci_service");gr2.addQuery("active",true);gr2.query();var total=gr2.getRowCount();return{status:mapped>=5?"ready":"needs_attention",actualValue:mapped+" services with maps of "+total+" total",finding:mapped<5?"Only "+mapped+" services have service maps. Now Assist TSOM uses maps for AI impact analysis -- incomplete maps limit assessment depth.":mapped+" services with maps -- Now Assist TSOM has service context for AI impact analysis."};})()
x_snc_airop_check_definition.remediation_guidance: Enable Service Mapping for key business services. Target your top 10 most critical applications.

sys_update_version.name: x_snc_airop_check_definition_0603a33acfd903108935fb251d851cb5
sys_update_version.payload: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><record_update><x_snc_airop_check_definition action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE"> <ai_justification><![CDATA[Business service maps provide the service context Now Assist TSOM uses for impact analysis. Without maps, AI cannot determine affected services.]]></ai_justification> <check_name>Business Service Mapping</check_name> <check_script><![CDATA[(function(){var gr=new GlideRecord("cmdb_ci_service");gr.addQuery("active",true);gr.addQuery("has_map",true);gr.query();var mapped=gr.getRowCount();var gr2=new GlideRecord("cmdb_ci_service");gr2.addQuery("active",true);gr2.query();var total=gr2.getRowCount();return{status:mapped>=5?"ready":"needs_attention",actualValue:mapped+" services with maps of "+total+" total",finding:mapped<5?"Only "+mapped+" services have service maps. Now Assist TSOM uses maps for AI impact analysis -- incomplete maps limit assessment depth.":mapped+" services with maps -- Now Assist TSOM has service context for AI impact analysis."};})()]]></check_script> <is_active>true</is_active> <is_clone_sensitive>false</is_clone_sensitive> <is_manual>false</is_manual> <module>AIOPS</module> <number>CHK0006073</number> <order>60</order> <remediation_guidance>Enable Service Mapping for key business services. Target your top 10 most critical applications.</remediation_guidance> <sys_created_by>admin</sys_created_by> <sys_created_on>2026-06-09 22:05:59</sys_created_on> <sys_id>0603a33acfd903108935fb251d851cb5</sys_id> <sys_mod_count>0</sys_mod_count> <sys_updated_by>admin</sys_updated_by> <sys_updated_on>2026-06-09 22:05:59</sys_updated_on> </x_snc_airop_check_definition></record_update>
